tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UBUNTU_HOST"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
move 0 before 1
edit 0
set name "EGRESS_ALLOW_UBUNTU_HTTP_DNS_LAN"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "LAN_NET" "PUBLIC_DNS_1" "PUBLIC_DNS_2"
set schedule "always"
set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS" "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "EGRESS_DENY_UBUNTU_C2"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "EGRESS_ALLOW_LAN_DNS"
        set uuid d60da79e-2941-51f1-b099-38f4d85d3cad
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "LAN_NET" "PUBLIC_DNS_1" "PUBLIC_DNS_2"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
next
    edit 3
        set name "EGRESS_BLOCK_C2"
        set uuid d61b8ac6-2941-51f1-5276-b6fcf28a153d
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 4
        set name "EGRESS_ALLOW_UBUNTU_HTTP_DNS_LAN"
        set uuid dc164ef2-2941-51f1-e371-f6d21f8ff1a3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "LAN_NET" "PUBLIC_DNS_1" "PUBLIC_DNS_2"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS" "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
edit 5
        set name "EGRESS_DENY_UBUNTU_C2"
        set uuid dc2d1484-2941-51f1-cbb0-056225be5df1
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
delete 2
delete 3
edit 4
set name "EGRESS_ALLOW_UBUNTU_HTTP_DNS_LAN"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "LAN_NET" "PUBLIC_DNS_1" "PUBLIC_DNS_2"
set schedule "always"
set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS" "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 5
set name "EGRESS_DENY_UBUNTU_C2"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall policy"}
